headline: How Kenvue’s AAD 2026 Sun Care Science Push At Kenvue (KVUE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: At the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting in Denver, Kenvue’s Neutrogena, Aveeno and Rogaine brands showcased new science-backed skincare and haircare products, 20 research abstracts, and educational initiatives for dermatology professionals, highlighting advances in hydration, acne care, healthy aging and sun protection. A particularly interesting angle for investors is Kenvue’s push to lead US sun care innovation by spotlighting bis-ethylhexyloxyphenol methoxyphenyl...
